text: For the electrical package we recommend Vantage E&M Engineering Ltd (F-EL-02) at HK$12,033,000 — the lowest-priced firm carrying no fatal risk flag, with a strong on-programme closeout record for LV distribution, lighting and testing and commissioning. We recommend against Subcontractor E (illustrative) (F-EL-01) despite the lowest price of HK$9,877,000: the proprietary database carries an active winding-up petition (Companies Registry HCCW 215/2026) and two safety-prosecution convictions (Labour Department), either of which is disqualifying regardless of price. On the bid sheet alone this firm looks like the obvious award — the cross-reference is what catches it. The recommended price sits just above the historical median (HK$11,850,000) and within the band HK$9,100,000–HK$15,400,000.
